general_provisions: This bill modifies provisions related to nicotine product taxes.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>increases the rate of the tax levied on cigarettes;<hr><ltbullet>replaces a weight-based tax rate for moist snuff and alternative nicotine products with a tax rate based on a percentage of the manufacturer's sales price;<hr><ltbullet>repeals provisions providing for a tax rate reduction for certain modified risk tobacco products;<hr><ltbullet>provides for an annual distribution of a portion of the money deposited into the Electronic Cigarette Substance and Nicotine Product Proceeds Restricted Account to fund certain law enforcement officer positions;<hr><ltbullet>includes coordination clauses to incorporate changes made to Section 59-14-807 with changes made to that section in H.B. 229, Restricted Account Modifications, and S.B. 98, Substance Use Rehabilitation Amendments; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
